ZSNAP_F01S_507.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.descri: Combines AP subledger items (from 501) and GL account balances (from 503) via UNION with a discriminator field, enabling side-by-side reconciliation and variance analysis in cube C20.
ZSNAP_F01S_507.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.purpos: Unions AP subledger items and GL account balances with discriminator for reconciliation
ZSNAP_F01S_507.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN.COMPANYCODE,
	MAIN.FISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN.LEDGERGLLINEITEM,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTTYPE,
	MAIN.DEBITCREDITCODE,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRYFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN.CONTROLLINGAREA,
	cast (CONCAT (MAIN.FISCALYEAR, MAIN.FISCALPERIOD) as NVARCHAR(7)) as FISCALYEARPERIOD,
	MAIN.FISCALPERIODENDDATE,
	:P_FISCALYEARPERIOD as SELECTEDYEARPERIOD,
	TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as KEYDATE,
	MAIN.FISCALYEARVARIANT,
	MAIN.FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE,
	MAIN.CLEARINGDATE,
	MAIN.PAYMENTTERMS,
	MAIN.SUPPLIER,
	MAIN.SUPPLIERACCOUNTGROUP,
	MAIN.GLACCOUNT,
	MAIN.CORPORATEGROUPACCOUNT,
	MAIN.CORPORATEGROUPCHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN.RECONCILIATIONACCOUNT,
	MAIN.SPECIALGLCODE,
	MAIN.COSTCENTER,
	MAIN.PROFITCENTER,
	MAIN.FUNCTIONALAREA,
	MAIN.BUSINESSAREA,
	MAIN.SIGNAGE,
	'AP' as RECONSOURCE,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.AMOUNTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	cast (0 as DECIMAL(19,2)) as BALAMTINTC,
	MAIN.TRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	MAIN.AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	cast (0 as DECIMAL(19,2)) as BALAMTINCC,
	MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	MAIN.AMOUNTINGLOBALCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	cast (0 as DECIMAL(19,2)) as BALAMTINGC,
	MAIN.GLOBALCURRENCY
from ZSNAP_F01S_501(:P_KEYDATE, :P_SIGNAGE) as MAIN
union all select
	MAIN.COMPANYCODE,
	MAIN.FISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN.LEDGERGLLINEITEM,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTTYPE,
	MAIN.DEBITCREDITCODE,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRYFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN.CONTROLLINGAREA,
	MAIN.FISCALYEARPERIOD,
	MAIN.FISCALPERIODENDDATE,
	:P_FISCALYEARPERIOD as SELECTEDYEARPERIOD,
	TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as KEYDATE,
	MAIN.FISCALYEARVARIANT,
	MAIN.FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE,
	MAIN.CLEARINGDATE,
	MAIN.PAYMENTTERMS,
	MAIN.SUPPLIER,
	MAIN.SUPPLIERACCOUNTGROUP,
	MAIN.GLACCOUNT,
	MAIN.CORPORATEGROUPACCOUNT,
	MAIN.CORPORATEGROUPCHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN.RECONCILIATIONACCOUNT,
	MAIN.SPECIALGLCODE,
	MAIN.COSTCENTER,
	MAIN.PROFITCENTER,
	MAIN.FUNCTIONALAREA,
	MAIN.BUSINESSAREA,
	MAIN.SIGNAGE,
	'GL' as RECONSOURCE,
	cast (0 as DECIMAL(19,2)) as AMOUNTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	MAIN.BALAMTINTC,
	MAIN.TRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	cast (0 as DECIMAL(19,2)) as AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	MAIN.BALAMTINCC,
	MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	cast (0 as DECIMAL(19,2)) as AMOUNTINGLOBALCURRENCY,
	MAIN.BALAMTINGC,
	MAIN.GLOBALCURRENCY
from ZSNAP_F01S_503(:P_SIGNAGE, :P_FISCALYEAR, :P_FISCALYEARPERIOD) as MAIN;
